title: squid bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7:5.5-22.2]
- Resolves: RHEL-131797 - 'ICAP_ERR_OTHER/408' occurs in icap.log when
  downloading a file on RHEL9

[7:5.5-22.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-122492 - squid: Squid vulnerable to information disclosure via
  authentication credential leakage in error handling (CVE-2025-62168)
full_text:
[7:5.5-22.2]
- Resolves: RHEL-131797 - 'ICAP_ERR_OTHER/408' occurs in icap.log when
  downloading a file on RHEL9

[7:5.5-22.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-122492 - squid: Squid vulnerable to information disclosure via
  authentication credential leakage in error handling (CVE-2025-62168)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23335.html
